description.zh: DENDRAL 是最早展示领域知识能让 AI 具有实际用途的专家系统之一。它把搜索与专家化学规则结合起来，根据质谱证据推断分子结构。这个项目把注意力从单纯通用推理转向富知识系统。
description.en: DENDRAL was one of the first expert systems to show that domain knowledge could make AI practically useful. It helped infer molecular structures from mass-spectrometry evidence by combining search with expert chemical rules. The project shifted attention from general reasoning alone to knowledge-rich systems.

role.zh: 专家系统 AI 代表人物

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
